race.comment: FASHION WORLD (8) rates strongly and takes her place on a 3-day backup. Has hit the line placing close-up both runs this preparation and Meech sticks aboard from the latest over this trip and Warracknabeal. Must be pleasing and has the numbers. STERNIN (11) settled too far back at Echuca but was close up in town and at Ballarat prior, over 1000m. Keeps Yendall and has the blinkers on for the first time. Expect him to push forward today and he has strong prospects. CONISTON SPICE (6) was good in the lead-ups but looked a run short at Swan Hill on debut. Has a handy gate and the tongue tie is applied today. In a leading barn and quick improvement is on the cards. Expect SILVER SNOW (5) to make good improvement third-up. Just missed this trip the last time he raced here, and he has the blinkers on again. That effort would have him well in the mix.
